offer: For accounting firms processing 10–20 invoices/month, inaccurate expense claims cause compliance issues. We validate expense reimbursement claims against policy rules instead of manual review of expense claims.
problem: Inaccurate expense claims leading to compliance issues.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for accounting firms
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on expense claims
DM outreach to accounting firms with demo video
Participate in forums for accounting tools discussions
try_it: Let users validate claims and configure rules on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow saving common inputs as templates
Set default reminder schedules for users
Enable CSV import for existing expense data
Facilitate one-click export of simple reports
Streamline onboarding process with fewer steps
